item.title: ‘PUT ON ICE’: Jeffries Cheers Noem Ousting, Vows to Fight for Removal of Bondi and Miller

item.title: BREAKING: Trump Says Kristi Noem Is Out as DHS Secretary

item.title: Trump’s Strike on Iran Is as America First as It Gets
item.description: President Donald Trump was elected on a simple, clear promise to put America first. Not America alone, and not America apologizing. America first. His...

item.title: Supreme Court Ruling Is Welcome News for Immigration Judges

item.title: Republicans Praise Daines Following Retirement Announcement
item.description: Sen. Steve Daines announced Wednesday night that he will not seek reelection in the upcoming 2026 midterms. The 63-year-old Montana Republican is join...
